hero.name: Rusbel
hero.description: Frontend Developer specialized in React. I focus on creating modern, fast interfaces and high-quality web experiences.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Dominican web developer passionate about technology and creating modern, fast, and responsive interfaces. I enjoy building digital experiences that are intuitive and efficient for users.
about.p2: I consider myself a dreamer, with a creative mind and great motivation to constantly learn and face new challenges in the world of web development.
about.quote: "My goal is to continue growing as a developer and create projects that add real value to people."

1.title: Rent Car Control
1.description: Comprehensive platform for managing car rental companies.

2.title: D'SotoRentCar
2.description: Corporate website for a car rental company, with a vehicle catalog, reservation form.

3.title: Soto Ventas
3.description: Website for searching houses and apartments for a Dominican real estate agency.

4.title: Food Store
4.description: Modern and responsive landing page for a food store, focused on an attractive and professional visual experience.

5.title: Little Dreamers 2
5.description: Modern and responsive landing page for a children’s daycare, featuring a clean design with services, gallery, and contact sections.

6.title: My Old Portfolio
6.description: This was my old portfolio when I was even more of a novice.
